sources.name: TheSportsDB
sources.role: Team and league artwork URLs returned by the provider.
sources.apiKey: Uses THESPORTSDB_API_KEY when set, otherwise the documented public v1 key 123.

sources.name: FlagCDN
sources.role: Country flag PNG URLs for World Cup matchup tiles.

sources.name: Local channel identifiers
sources.role: Small text-based SVG channel identifiers, not scraped official marks.

sources.name: Local league assets
sources.role: Manually verified league/tournament marks stored under assets/logos/leagues/.

aston-martin-aramco-formula-one-team.name: Aston Martin Aramco Formula One Team

visa-cash-app-racing-bulls-formula-one-t.name: Visa Cash App Racing Bulls Formula One Team

notes: Manual entries can be preserved by setting manual: true or source: manual.
Missing logos should fall back inside the UI rather than blocking rendering.
